name: pick me up
storySummary:
In "The Dungeon's Call Ch. 1-37," civilians, including the pragmatic Han Seojin, are abruptly thrust into a deadly "game" by a powerful, electric-wielding fairy guide. After many initial participants die, an enraged unseen "Overseer" forcibly assembles new parties, coercing survivors into a glowing portal. Han, despite his calm demeanor, coldly considers taking a terrified woman's shield before physically forcing a protesting old man into the gateway.

They emerge in a luminous chamber, where system messages reveal they are in the "Main Dungeon," "Floor I," tasked to "ENTER THE TOWER AND SAVE THE WORLD!" Teleported again to a desolate, fiery landscape, their mission is to "neutralize enemies," as Level 3 Goblins appear. Other survivors, including Jenna, are paralyzed by a "state of fear" debuff and trapped by an invisible barrier, unable to fight. Han, leading a red-haired archer, plans to confront monstrous foes, but internally reveals he has *never* wielded a sword or shield before. He battles desperately, believing only luck matters in this "game." The scene then shifts to a mysterious red-haired female archer observing three fallen men. The episode concludes with a grand reveal of a colossal, ominous, intricately carved stone gateway in a vast underground chamber, hinting at immense power or a grave challenge ahead.

"The Dungeon's Call Ch. 2-40" reveals Han Seojin's past as a cynical mobile gamer of "Pick Me Up!", a game with permadeath heroes and a 100-floor tower. Back in the present, Han (now Han Islat) sends a "scout team" into an "Advent Dungeon" only for them to face a "LEVEL 999?" boss. A mysterious "Observer" seeks "schematics" from player deaths, while the monstrous Lv. 999 entity, "《SSHROEX》," declares "I found you" to Han.

Han is then forcibly subjected to "ACCOUNT CREATION," where the system assigns him the name "ANYTNG" and welcomes him to "PICK ME UP!" His eye glows with defiance. Addressed as "Master," he is tasked to save the world of "Townia" from "unknown enemies" by entering "The Tower," immediately receiving a "TUTORIAL QUEST" to defeat goblins. During a desperate fight, the system shockingly announces, "THE FIGHT WILL START AUTOMATICALLY... PERFORMED BY THE HERO'S AI!", stripping Han of combat agency.

After his first kill, Han experiences profound psychological trauma, screaming in agony, before the system declares "STAGE CLEAR!" and "LEVEL UP!". Transported to a familiar, serene realm, he is prompted to "summon a companion." From a glowing gateway, the "Super! Rare!" Knight, Shay Lathasterie, materializes. The system states "Master Anytng received Hero Shay," but Shay immediately questions Han Seojin, asking "Did you summon me? Who are you?" and calling his name "strange." Han is left bewildered, facing a powerful new ally who doubts his identity.
